CREATE INDEX idx_waba_capability_waba_observed ON public.waba_capability USING btree (waba_id, observed_at)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX waba_capability_pkey ON public.waba_capability USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_waba_health_unit_at ON public.waba_health USING btree (unit_id, observed_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_waba_health_waba_at ON public.waba_health USING btree (waba_id, observed_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX waba_health_pkey ON public.waba_health USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_waba_violations_observed ON public.waba_violations USING btree (observed_at)
CREATE INDEX idx_waba_violations_unit ON public.waba_violations USING btree (unit_id, observed_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_waba_violations_waba ON public.waba_violations USING btree (waba_id, observed_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX waba_violations_pkey ON public.waba_violations USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX wabas_pkey ON public.wabas USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX wabas_waba_id_key ON public.wabas USING btree (waba_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX webhook_configs_pkey ON public.webhook_configs USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_webhook_events_correlation ON public.webhook_events_log USING btree (correlation_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_webhook_events_unprocessed ON public.webhook_events_log USING btree (processed) WHERE (processed = false)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX webhook_events_log_pkey ON public.webhook_events_log USING btree (id)
